runTitle: Local dev dashboard runtime verification after QueryProvider devtools hydration fix

completedImprovements.title: React Query Devtools hydration mismatch removal
completedImprovements.evidence: QueryProvider devtools client-only mount gating + local dev browser recheck
completedImprovements.note: get_errors returned no runtime errors after dev server restart and browser reload.

notes: Cold compile for /dashboard still took about 101s on first request after server restart.
After compile completion and browser reload, Next MCP reported no runtime errors in the active session.
serverId query-focus still opened the target server modal and preserved the expected detail tabs.
